underlying_goal: Implement an underwater image/video enhancement tool and iteratively refine it to match a reference image quality, exploring both traditional CV and deep learning approaches
friction_detail: Deep learning integration failed due to Keras version incompatibility, GitHub access issues blocked multiple approaches, traditional algorithm tuning produced white noise and over-blurred results, and Bash session broke near the end preventing final testing.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement and refine an underwater image enhancement tool to match a reference image quality; initial implementation was done but iterative refinement through both traditional CV and deep learning approaches failed to reach the target quality, with environment issues and compatibility problems consuming most of the session.
